text.message: I actually have been alternating who I steal from
I have stolen from all 3 of you
but u do have the best chance of winning so will be blocking u
I can trade a road for sheep and wheat
You have same points and 2 devs
Lot of devs for no ore
I can't believe never got a 7
And black rolls it every time
My hand has been so dead
And red keeps takinf my best cards smh
I have thrown away so many cards smh
Just blocking him sorry you were collateral damage
they refused to give me a roll the last 5 mins but still won
